title: Quagga's Garage
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Quagga's Garage''' was a small operation based on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] that provided equipment to [[Technician/Legends|mechanics]] on Tatooine.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-10-26 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''
